name: Castle Basics
description: Learn greetings, names, and simple words at the royal castle.
storyIntro: Welcome, brave princess! The castle gates are open, and everyone is eager to meet you. Let us begin your journey with the most important words — the words of greeting and friendship.

name: Garden of Words
description: Discover colors, animals, and the beauty of nature.
storyIntro: Beyond the castle walls lies a magical garden filled with wonders...

name: Village Voices
description: Meet the villagers and learn about family and daily life.
storyIntro: The village below the castle is full of kind people...

name: Royal Market
description: Numbers, food, and the art of asking for things.
storyIntro: The royal market is bustling with activity...

name: Sky Kingdom
description: Build sentences and have your first conversations.
storyIntro: High above the clouds, the Sky Kingdom awaits...
